name: google-contacts-mcp
description: Google Contacts MCP server. Six tools: search_contacts, get_contact, list_label_groups, apply_label, remove_label, update_contact. Grants OAuth scopes contacts.readonly, contacts.other.readonly, and contacts (full write) — the write surface is tool-limited to label apply/remove and additive-only field updates, but the scope grant itself is not narrowed. OAuth credentials live in the macOS keychain; no tokens in your config.
